born_approximation.name: Born Approximation Scattering Amplitude
born_approximation.description: f(theta) ~ -(m/2pi*hbar^2) integral V(r') e^{-iq.r'} d^3r', the first Born approximation for the scattering amplitude. q is the momentum transfer.
born_approximation.search_text: Born approximation scattering amplitude first order perturbation Fourier transform potential weak scattering cross section momentum transfer

transmission_coefficient_barrier.name: Transmission Coefficient (Rectangular Barrier)
transmission_coefficient_barrier.description: T for a rectangular barrier of height V0 and width a when E > V0. k2 = sqrt(2m(E-V0))/hbar.
transmission_coefficient_barrier.search_text: Transmission coefficient rectangular barrier quantum tunneling probability resonance Ramsauer-Townsend effect transparency barrier penetration

reflection_coefficient.name: Reflection Coefficient
reflection_coefficient.description: R = 1 - T, the reflection coefficient. Conservation of probability requires R + T = 1.
reflection_coefficient.search_text: Reflection coefficient probability conservation scattering barrier step potential reflected wave current density unitarity

partial_wave_cross_section.name: Partial Wave Cross Section
partial_wave_cross_section.description: sigma_l = (4 pi / k^2)(2l+1) sin^2(delta_l), contribution to the total cross section from the l-th partial wave.
partial_wave_cross_section.search_text: Partial wave cross section phase shift angular momentum scattering total cross section optical theorem unitarity limit s-wave p-wave

optical_theorem.name: Optical Theorem
optical_theorem.description: sigma_total = (4 pi / k) Im[f(0)], relates the total cross section to the forward scattering amplitude.
optical_theorem.search_text: Optical theorem total cross section forward scattering amplitude imaginary part unitarity probability conservation shadow scattering
